name: Round Chunky Straight Rattan Basket Dark Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Store everyday essentials in an authentic style with the Round Chunky Straight Rattan Basket from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This dark brown basket is designed in a round shape with a lid to help keep the blankets, toys and other items organized nicely and out of sight. Woven with rattan, this lidded basket comes with double handles for easy lifting and movement around spaces, and it fits nicely under the table for convenient storage.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
